case_title: RODRIGUEZ, ARTHUR A. et al VS BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,844.58 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, ARTHUR A. RODRIGUEZ, AMELIA A. AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. $10.00 FEE PAID. PLEASE READ LETTER FROM DEFENDANT RE-REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE,
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-08-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DEFT BELLACH'S FURNITURE RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARTHUR A. RODRIGUEZ, AMELIA A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME: BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE. PLAINTIFF REDRIGUEZ MAY EITHER ACCEPT THE FURNITURE ORIGINALLY PURCHASED TO BE DELIVERED AT DEFENDANT BELLACH'S EXPENSE OR FULFILL THE TERMS OF THE PREVIOUS AGREED SETTLEMENT SET FORTH IN DEFT'S SALES ORDER NO. 05134005 ON MAY 13, 2006. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT. FORWARDING TIME EXPIRED.
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT FILED BY DEFT BELLACH'S LEATHER FURNITURE. COMPUTER WILL NOT ACCEPT FILING.
